title: Instant Win Button
description: Adds an instakill melee weapon... or so you thought.
body:
Make sure to download both the datapack and resource pack files! Report bugs in the [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/jmVGMvtrcd).
### FEATURES
- Win button that makes any mob it touches become unable to despawn, get slow falling for 20 seconds, and teleport above the end exit portal.
- Use `/trigger give_button` while in Creative mode to get the button.
### CREDIT
- Inspired by Jonny RaZeR's video linked here.
